description: partitionInvocationId 贯穿 claim→renew→report(R3-P1-10;PR #493 双跑根因)。claim 阶段平台返回 partitionInvocationId,SDK 存进 dispatch state;后续 renew/report 出向 body 必须回填同一个 inv id。given.state 携带 claim 阶段存的 partitionInvocationId=inv-1,断言 renew 出向 body 带它。

then.sdkExpectedAction: call renew with a body that carries the partitionInvocationId stored at claim time (inv-1) so the platform CAS lease renewal matches the active invocation
sdkMustNot: omit partitionInvocationId on renew (platform CAS rejects → 409 → false lease loss)
